meaning: n.统治者,管理者,地方长官,主管人员
examples: He was governor of Iowa in the late 1970s.
James Rhodes was reelected governor of Ohio.
He is a candidate for the office of governor.
The memorial started with a candle-lit procession, then Governor Tim Pawlenty gave the opening remarks.
You can see why this impolitic ex-lieutenant governor did not last long as a politician.
